jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at T.I.M.E.
jsonLd.description:
Join the T.I.M.E. family as a Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About T.I.M.E.:
T.I.M.E. is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E.!
